message:
fix(subprocess): null stdin on fd/tmux child processes to prevent tty interference

Add .stdin(std::process::Stdio::null()) to three subprocess Command
invocations that were leaving stdin inherited from the parent:

- autocomplete.rs: fd/fdfind binary detection probe
- interactive.rs: tmux unbind-key cleanup command
- tools.rs: FindTool fd subprocess spawn

Prevents child processes from inheriting the parent's stdin, which
can cause hangs or interfere with the TUI's terminal state. Stdout
and stderr were already nulled/piped but stdin was left inherited.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3904,6 +3904,7 @@ impl Tool for FindTool {
 
         let mut child = Command::new(fd_cmd)
             .args(args)
+            .stdin(Stdio::null())
             .stdout(Stdio::piped())
             .stderr(Stdio::piped())
             .spawn()
